name: Curried Lentils
recipeIngredient: 2 large Onions, chopped fine (2 cups), divided
Salt to taste, if desired (omit if using broth)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the lentils, broth or water, half the onions, and salt. Bring the ingredients to a boil.
2. Reduce the heat, cover the pan, and simmer the lentils until they are tender, about 30-40 minutes.
3. Drain the lentils.
4. While the lentils are cooking, heat the olive oil in a skillet. Add the remaining onions and minced garlic, and sauté the vegetables until they begin to brown.
5. Add the sautéed onions and garlic, along with the curry powder, to the cooked lentils. Combine well.
6. Cover the pan and heat the lentils a few minutes longer.
7. Serve over rice.
